title: Geepas Halogen Heater 1200W | Instant Heating Energy Efficient Heater with 3 Heat Settings 400/800/1200W | Oscillation Function & Low Running Cost | 3 Bar Compact Radiator Home Office, Grey
features: ✅ INSTANT HEATING, OSCILLATION FUNCTION – This electric heater gives you immediate warmth after you switch it on. Lightweight and portable heater with oscillating function spreads heat evenly across your room. Built with a high-quality resistant base for extra stability, making it a reliable room heater for everyday use.

✅ 3 HEAT SETTINGS – Equipped with 3 halogen tubes, this 1200W halogen heater offers 3 heat settings at 400W/800W/1200W. Simply plug into a mains socket and adjust the warmth to your preference. Ideal as a camping heater, portable room heater, or halogen heater for home and garage use.

✅ COMPACT & LIGHTWEIGHT – Designed as a small heater for home and office, it comes with an integral carry handle for easy movement. This low energy silent heater is lightweight, portable, and convenient to use anywhere. (To prevent any accidental damage, please don’t move the heater when it’s ON).

✅ SAFETY WARNING – Please don’t move this energy-efficient halogen heater when it’s ON. Handle your portable heater carefully to prevent the halogen tubes from getting fused. Do not use the heater if tubes or housing are damaged. A safe and reliable low energy heater for home use.

✅ NOTE – Please be extra cautious as the halogen tubes are made of glass. If a bulb breaks accidentally, it’s best to replace the tube immediately. This compact halogen heater for home ensures safe, efficient, and reliable heating when handled with care.
description: Product Description OSCILLATION FUNCTION Distributing warmth evenly across a wider area. MULTIPLE HEATING This halogen heater creates the ideal temperature for you by offering multiple settings. SAFETY TIP-OVER SWITCH Automatically shuts off if accidentally knocked over. INSTANT HEATING The fan circulates warm air quickly, providing immediate heat. FULLY PORTABLE The Geepas halogen heater lightweight and easy to transport. OVER HEAT SAFETY CUT-OFF Provides added safety and peace of mind. 400W, 800W & 1200W HEATING With 3 Halogen tubes and has 3 heat settings ranging from 400W/800W/1200W. STREAMLINE DESIGN With important steam line design components
